name: King Ranch Chicken Lite
recipeIngredient: 6 large chicken breast halves, boned and skinned
10 ounces packaged corn tortillas (divided use), quartered
10 3/4 ounces Campbell's cream of chicken soup, Healthy Request
10 3/4 ounces Campbell's cream of mushroom soup, Healthy Request
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken in one cup of water for 10 minutes. Remove and let cool; reserve broth.
2. When cooled, shred the chicken into pieces.
3. Dip half the tortillas in chicken broth to soften and place them in a 9x13x2-inch baking dish to cover the bottom.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of broth over the tortillas.
5. Layer with half of the shredded chicken, diced onion, and diced bell pepper.
6. Repeat layers with remaining tortillas, chicken, and vegetables.
7. Sprinkle cheese, garlic powder, and chili powder on top.
8. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
9. In a medium bowl, combine both soups and pour over the casserole.
10. Top with Ro-tel tomatoes.
11. Bake for about 45 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
